finding: `taskflow pre-close` suggested a governed commit command without `--auto-stage`, while the wrapper rejected the first attempt with `ATM_GIT_COMMIT_TASK_SCOPED_STAGING_REQUIRED`; separately, passing low-level `--status done` to `taskflow close` produced `ATM_CLI_USAGE` because that flag belongs to `tasks close`.
expectedBehavior: Close playbooks should emit one copy-paste-ready command sequence with the correct staging mode and taskflow-specific flags; low-level and taskflow option names should be rejected with a targeted migration hint.
evidenceOrRepro: Reproduced during TASK-AAO-0170 on 2026-07-12. Adding `--auto-stage` made the governed delivery commit succeed; removing `--status` made taskflow close dry-run succeed. Fixed 2026-07-13 in TASK-AAO-0190: dirty-guard and commit-bundle remediation now include `--auto-stage`; `taskflow --status` returns a migration hint to omit the flag or use `tasks close --status`.
